---
title: "Harriett Elizabeth Mozley"
---

## Harriett Elizabeth Mozley

**Dates:** (1803-17 July 1852)

**Maiden name:** (Newman)

### Description

writer for children

### Biography

Sister of Cardinal Newman, she married (23 Sept 1836) Thomas Mozley (1806-1893).  Some sources spell her name Harriet. [NCBEL]

### Letters

- Letter from December 10, 1896.
- Letter from December 8, 1896.
- Letter from [About 1865]
- Letter from March 21st 1860
- Letter from October 29 [1849]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
